name: ASRock B850M PRO RS WIFI WHITE Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - 802.11axe Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: ASRock B850M PRO RS WIFI WHITE Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5
description: ASRock micro-ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with DDR5 support and Wi-Fi 6E in white finish.
